comment: "This course is very very important for me. I am a new learner and I learned a lot of things from this course."

"I found the sections on cognitive aids during crisis situations and their practical application in the operating room most interesting, as well as the parts covering anesthesia management for cesarean delivery and how to handle emergencies effectively."
"I have find this course very important as it demonstrates practically the best technique to use during cesarian section and how to avoid different complications due to anaesthesia practice."

"The most interesting aspects were the clear explanation of different anaesthetic techniques for caesarean delivery and the practical, step-by-step approach. The clinical scenarios and visual materials helped to better understand decision-making in everyday practice, especially in resource-limited settings."

"The discussion on post-dural puncture headache was particularly insightful, especially regarding the recommendation to prioritize phenylephrine over ephedrine in clinical practice. Overall, the entire content was highly informative and demonstrated significant relevance to my professional practice in the field of anesthesia."
"Caecerean delivery is preferred and done throughout the world, therefore it is important for this learning flatform where we can access vital information online, I appreciate this."
